parameters.name: customer_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the customer, created using the [Create Customer](https://docs.y.uno/reference/create-customer) endpoint (MAX 64; MIN 36).

account_id.description: The unique identifier of the account. You find this information on [Yuno's Dashboard](https://dashboard.y.uno/) (MAX 64; MIN 36).

type.description: The payment method type (MAX 255; MIN 3; [Payment type](/reference/payment-type-list)).

workflow.description: The payment workflow indicates whether the integration will use Yuno's SDK or will be a back to back connection. Since you are in the Direct workflow, the value must be `DIRECT`.

callback_url.description: URL to return the customer after an enrollment in a provider´s environment. Only necessary for alternative payment methods integrations (MAX 255; MIN 3).

token.description: Pre-generated token used to reference the payment method being enrolled.

parent_type.description: Type of the parent payment method, used when enrolling a tokenized/derived method (e.g. `CARD`).

card_data.description: Specifies the details of the card. Only for `DIRECT` workflow integration.

number.description: Card’s number without any separators (MAX 19; MIN 8) - only available for PCI certified merchants.

expiration_month.description: Card’s expiration month - MM (MAX 2; MIN 2) - only available for PCI certified merchants.

expiration_year.description: Card’s expiration year - YYYY  (MAX 4; MIN 4) - only available for PCI certified merchants.

security_code.description: Card’s security code (MAX 4; MIN 3) - only available for PCI certified merchants.

holder_name.description: Cardholder’s full name as it appears on the card (MAX 26; MIN 3) - only available for PCI certified merchants.

scheme.description: Card scheme used to process the transaction (validated card scheme).

soft_descriptor.description: Statement descriptor shown on the cardholder’s bank statement.

card_pin.description: Card PIN, for payment methods that require it.

customer_payer.description: Information about the customer/payer associated with the payment method.

code.description: Yuno customer identifier (customer code). MIN 3 / MAX 255.

organization_customer_external_id.description: Customer identifier in the merchant’s own system, scoped to the organization. MIN 3 / MAX 255.

ip_address.description: IP address of the customer at the time of enrollment. Required by the provider for the online ACH mandate.

browser_info.description: Browser metadata. Required by the provider for the online ACH mandate.

user_agent.description: Full user-agent string of the customer’s browser.

payment_method.description: Payment method wrapper used for non-card methods (e.g. bank transfer / ACH) and vaulting options.

type.description: Method type label for the enrolled instrument (e.g. `ACH_ENROLLMENT`). The enrollment type is driven by the top-level `type`; this field is informational.

vault_on_success.description: When `true`, the payment method is vaulted (saved) after a successful enrollment.

detail.description: Method-specific details for the instrument being enrolled.

account_holder_type.description: Type of account holder (e.g. `INDIVIDUAL`, `ENTITY`). Accepted and stored, but not forwarded to the provider for ACH — does not control individual vs. company treatment for ACH enrollment.

bank_id.description: Identifier of the bank. MIN 3 / MAX 255.

bank_name.description: Name of the bank. MIN 3 / MAX 255.

beneficiary_name.description: Name of the account beneficiary. MIN 3 / MAX 255.

reference.description: Reference associated with the bank account. MIN 1 / MAX 255.

provider_data.description: Provider data used for token migration or provider-token enrollment. Send this object when `token_source` is `PROVIDER_API`, `MIGRATION_FILE`, or `PROVIDER_TOKEN`. Usage must be agreed with your commercial advisor in Yuno.

id.description: The unique identifier of the payment provider.

token_source.description: Origin of the provided token. Note: `PROVIDER_TOKEN` is only supported when the top-level `type` is `CARD`. Using it with `ACH_ENROLLMENT` returns an error.

payment_method_token.description: Provider’s payment method token. Required when `token_source` is `PROVIDER_TOKEN`.

connection_id.description: Identifier of the provider connection. Required when `token_source` is `PROVIDER_API` or `PROVIDER_TOKEN`.

verify.description: Indicates whether to verify the payment with a verify transaction or not. You’ll need to have a provider defined in your CARD route. False by default.

vault_on_success.description: Indicates whether to verify the payment with a verify transaction or not. You’ll need to have a provider defined in your CARD route. False by default.

currency.description: Currency of the card verification. For a full list of currency codes, see [Country reference](/reference/country-reference) (MAX 3; MIN 3; ISO 4217).

recurring_payment.description: Recurring / subscription billing metadata associated with the enrolled method.

label.description: Display label for the recurring billing plan.

interval_count.description: Number of interval units between charges (e.g. `1` = every month when `interval_unit` is `MONTH`).

browser_info.user_agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 14_0) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/144.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

holder_name.description: Cardholder's full name as returned by the payment provider.

country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the card's issuing country.

holder_name.description: Cardholder's full name as returned by the payment provider.

country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the card's issuing country.

messages: The merchant has no authorization to use this API.

items.example: The merchant has no authorization to use this API.
